Class PlanetsLandState

java.lang.Object
Controller.State
Controller.Planets.PlanetsLandState
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class PlanetsLandState extends State
This state allows players to collect goods from the planets they landed on during the ChoosePlanetState. Players can select goods to store in their cargo holds or rearrange their existing goods before ending the phase. Once all players and planets are handled, the game transitions back to the FlightPhase.
See Also:

  • Method Details

    • getGood

      public void getGood(String playerName, int goodIndex, Coordinates coordinates, int CargoHoldIndex) throws InvalidContextualAction, InvalidParameters
      Allows a player to collect a good from the current planet and store it in a cargo hold. Only the first special player can perform this action. The good must be placed in a valid cargo hold component. If the good is successfully added, the planet and player are removed from their respective lists. The game continues until all chosen planets and special players are processed.
      Overrides:
      getGood in class State
      Parameters:
      playerName - the name of the player collecting the good
      goodIndex - the index of the good in the planet's reward list
      coordinates - the coordinates of the cargo hold on the player's ship
      CargoHoldIndex - the index within the cargo hold where the good should be placed
      Throws:
      InvalidContextualAction
      InvalidParameters

    • moveGood

      public void moveGood(String name, Coordinates oldCoordinates, Coordinates newCoordinates, int oldIndex, int newIndex) throws InvalidContextualAction, InvalidParameters
      Allows a player to move a good from one cargo hold to another. Both source and destination must be valid cargo holds.
      Overrides:
      moveGood in class State
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the player performing the move
      oldCoordinates - the coordinates of the current cargo hold
      newCoordinates - the coordinates of the target cargo hold
      oldIndex - the index of the good in the original cargo hold
      newIndex - the index in the target cargo hold where the good should be placed
      Throws:
      InvalidContextualAction
      InvalidParameters

    • end

      public void end(String playerName) throws InvalidParameters
      Called when a player ends their interaction with the current planet. Immediately transitions to the FlightPhase.
      Overrides:
      end in class State
      Parameters:
      playerName - the name of the player ending the phase
      Throws:
      InvalidParameters
